top_signals.title: Wheat Soars as Ukraine Attacks on Russia Seen as Export Risk
top_signals.summary: Wheat prices jumped Friday as traders weighed potential shipping disruptions following Ukraine’s attacks on top exporter Russia.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: The Iran War threatened a food crisis. The next Gulf conflict could do the same. - Reuters
top_signals.summary: The Iran War threatened a food crisis. The next Gulf conflict could do the same.  Reuters
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Main Committee Meeting – 26 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England chairs the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC), which is a forum for discussion of the wholesale foreign exchange market. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: The Ukraine Lesson Taiwan Keeps Missing
top_signals.summary: It’s not the drones—It’s everything around them.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Minutes of the London FXJSC Legal Sub Committee Meeting – 17 March 2026
top_signals.summary: The Bank of England provides the Secretariat to the London Foreign Exchange Joint Standing Committee (FXJSC) Legal Sub-Committee. The FXJSC is made up of market participants, infrastructure providers and the UK financial regulators.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Central-bank repricing affecting yields, FX, liquidity and equities.

top_signals.title: Ryuk operator pleads guilty; Blackcat/AlphV conspirator gets nearly 6-year sentence
top_signals.summary: One man accused of deploying Ryuk ransomware pleaded guilty Wednesday in an Oregon federal court to conspiracy and computer fraud, while another man received a 70-month federal prison sentence in a Florida court for helping the Blackcat/AlphV gang extort multiple victims.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Ledger researchers disclose Tangem card flaw; Tangem says risk to everyday users is ‘virtually non-existent’
top_signals.summary: Ledger researchers disclosed a laser attack that resets Tangem card passwords by bypassing a recovery-state check in the firmware.
top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Non-executive director reappointment at GAD
top_signals.summary: The Government Actuary’s Department (GAD) announces the reappointment of Liz Thornhill as non-executive director.

top_signals.title: Rheinmetall, MBDA to develop laser weapon for German Navy
top_signals.summary: Rheinmetall and MBDA aim to field an operational laser weapon for the German Navy in 2029.
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.

top_signals.title: Can the Private Sector Save Vietnam?
top_signals.summary: Why the Communist Party wants business to boom.
